name: Lion
funFact: Lions are called the King of the Jungle!

name: Elephant
funFact: Elephants never forget and are very smart!

name: Giraffe
funFact: Giraffes are the tallest animals on Earth!

name: Monkey
funFact: Monkeys love bananas and are very playful!

name: Penguin
funFact: Penguins can't fly but are amazing swimmers!

name: Dolphin
funFact: Dolphins are one of the smartest animals!

name: Rabbit
funFact: Rabbits love carrots and can hop very fast!

name: Bear
funFact: Bears sleep all winter in a deep sleep called hibernation!

name: Tiger
funFact: Every tiger has unique stripes like fingerprints!

name: Panda
funFact: Pandas eat bamboo for up to 12 hours a day!

name: Koala
funFact: Koalas sleep up to 22 hours a day!

name: Fox
funFact: Foxes are very clever and can hear mice underground!

name: Dog
funFact: Dogs are humans' best friends for over 15000 years!

name: Cat
funFact: Cats can see in the dark and always land on their feet!

name: Owl
funFact: Owls can turn their heads almost all the way around!

name: Butterfly
funFact: Butterflies taste with their feet!

name: Zebra
funFact: No two zebras have the same stripe pattern!

name: Hippopotamus
funFact: Hippos can hold their breath for 5 minutes underwater!

name: Kangaroo
funFact: Baby kangaroos are called joeys and live in pouches!

name: Crocodile
funFact: Crocodiles have been around since dinosaur times!

name: Turtle
funFact: Some turtles can live over 100 years!

name: Snake
funFact: Snakes smell with their tongues!

name: Frog
funFact: Frogs can jump 20 times their body length!

name: Shark
funFact: Sharks have been around for 400 million years!

name: Whale
funFact: Blue whales are the largest animals ever!

name: Octopus
funFact: Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood!

name: Bee
funFact: Bees do a special dance to tell others where flowers are!

name: Ant
funFact: Ants can carry 50 times their own body weight!

name: Horse
funFact: Horses can sleep standing up!

name: Cow
funFact: Cows have best friends and get stressed when separated!

name: Pig
funFact: Pigs are smarter than dogs and very clean animals!

name: Sheep
funFact: Sheep can recognize up to 50 different faces!

name: Goat
funFact: Goats have rectangular pupils in their eyes!

name: Chicken
funFact: Chickens can remember over 100 different faces!

name: Duck
funFact: Ducks' quacks don't echo and nobody knows why!

name: Mouse
funFact: Mice can squeeze through tiny spaces the size of a pencil!

name: Hamster
funFact: Hamsters can run up to 8 miles a night on their wheel!

name: Deer
funFact: Male deer grow new antlers every year!

name: Squirrel
funFact: Squirrels plant thousands of trees by forgetting where they buried nuts!

name: Hedgehog
funFact: Hedgehogs have about 5000 spines on their back!
